tasks.label: Prepare debug folder
args: if not exist debug mkdir debug

tasks.label: Build Project (g++)
args: setlocal enabledelayedexpansion && set sources="${workspaceFolder}\main.cpp" && if exist "${workspaceFolder}\src\*.cpp" (for %%f in ("${workspaceFolder}\src\*.cpp") do set sources=!sources! "%%f") && "D:\MinGW\ucrt64\bin\g++.exe" -std=c++17 -g -I"${workspaceFolder}\include" !sources! -o "${workspaceFolder}\debug\main.exe"
